meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Solve Founder's Block (Checklist)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with no project ideas. Use this Antigravity project template and Claude Code guide to build, validate, and launch your SaaS MVP in record time.
content.answer_block: The 'no project ideas' trap is solved by rapid iteration, not deep contemplation. Use the Antigravity template to scaffold a production-ready SaaS, then leverage Claude Code to automate your business logic. By focusing on micro-SaaS utilities, you bypass analysis paralysis and start generating revenue through real market feedback immediately.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You have the technical hunger and the drive to build, but you are paralyzed by the 'no project ideas' paradox—waiting for a lightning bolt of genius that never strikes. While you wait, the market moves on, and your potential revenue sits stagnant in your imagination.

It is time to stop waiting for perfection and start building for velocity. The Antigravity project template is designed to cut through the noise, providing a hardened, production-ready foundation that handles the boilerplate so you can focus on the unique value proposition. This is your roadmap to transforming a vague concept into a deployable SaaS MVP.

steps.title: Define the Micro-Problem
steps.description: Identify a small, painful task in a specific niche. Focus on a problem you can solve in 48 hours.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a SaaS project structure for a micro-utility that solves [Insert Niche] pain points. Include user authentication, stripe integration, and a clean dashboard.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Core Logic
steps.description: Use AI to scaffold the business logic. Focus on the 'happy path' that delivers value to the user immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create the core service logic for [Insert Project Idea]. Prioritize clean architecture and modular functions for easy testing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'implement the core business logic based on the antigravity schema'

steps.title: Integrate Monetization Early
steps.description: Don't build for free. Wire your Stripe API keys into the template from day one to validate willingness-to-pay.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the Stripe checkout flow within the Antigravity template. Ensure webhooks are set up for subscription management.

steps.title: Automate the UI/UX Layer
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate responsive components that match the SaaS aesthetic without manual CSS labor.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard component using Tailwind CSS that displays core user metrics.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ui 'create a dashboard component with charts and user stats'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Move from local environment to live URL. Your MVP is only real when users can access it.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment configuration file for Vercel for this Antigravity project.

pro_tips: Prioritize 'boring' SaaS ideas; high-volume utility tools generate more predictable MRR than complex social platforms.
Use Claude Code to write your unit tests simultaneously with the features to prevent technical debt from slowing your launch.
Inject your own specific domain knowledge into the Antigravity prompt to differentiate your product from generic AI-generated code.
Set up a 'Waitlist' page as your first project component to capture emails before the actual product is finished.
Audit your code via Claude Code every 3 commits to ensure your project structure remains compliant with production standards.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, share the link in 3 niche-specific communities (Reddit, IndieHackers, or X) to gather your first 10 users and refine your feature set based on actual usage data.
content.conversion_block: Stop dreaming about the 'perfect' idea and start building the one that pays. You have the tools, the template, and the roadmap. The only variable left is your execution. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
